semantic.role: CLI command adapter for interactive documentation language configuration management in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Presents an interactive prompt for users to select documentation languages from available choices.
Lists currently configured languages from the system configuration.
Loads and displays language snapshots from the manifest for user reference.
Saves updated language selections back to the configuration via the infra layer.
outOfScope: Implementing core language discovery or validation logic (delegated to document-languages module).
Direct persistence operations (delegated to Config service).
Business logic for language processing or analysis.
invariants: Must remain a thin command adapter, delegating business logic and persistence to services and infra.
Must not contain pipeline, scanning, or data transformation logic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Decouple CLI entrypoints from core services to improve testability and reuse, aligning with the recent refactor to modularize CLI and decouple core infra services.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactor to modularize CLI and decouple core infra services, ensuring CLI modules act as thin adapters.
